column9:
Rule 1:If a court order exists (T1049) and the NCP/PF is unidentified (MCI number is 999995 and the member status in VCMEM is active) do NOT convert a SORD and OBLE.
Rule 2:For cases where the T1044.IVD_ typ_cd = DIRP do not create a VOBLE record.
Rule 3:If VCASE.StatusCase_CODE = C (closed) and the VOBLE.EndObligation_DATE > conversion date
move VCASE.StatusCurrent_DATE.
If the case is a no charge case (T1049.CHRG_FREQ_CD = NO-C and the VOBLE.EndObligation_DATE > conversion date
move conversion date.
Rule:Starting at 1, increment by 1 for each oble record created per VSORD and per case.

Rule:If voble.TypeDebt_CODE  = 'SS' or 'GT' move vcmem.membermci_idno where CaseRelationShip_CODE = 'C'
else move T1052.mci_num for the dependents. For CS obligations that are charging, the dependent(s) must be active. If not active, do not move inactive DPs.
If moving dependents all financials need to be divided by the total number of dependents added to the obligation.
For arrears only cases:
Any child linked to the order  i.e. an OBLE is converted with a DP MCI, that DP  must have an active status in VCMEM.  i.e. VCMEM.CaseMemberStatus_CODE needs to be  converted to 'A'.
For arrears only cases where NO DP is linked to the latest order in DACSES:
If only 1 DP on case: Link that DP to the order   
If more than 1 DP on case: 1 (or more) DPs are active - link those DPs
    If no DPs are active and  1 or more were linked to a previous order Link those DPs from the previous order  
    If no DPs are active and none were  ever linked to order: Link the youngest DP (if twins or triplets etc..  link all)

Rule:If voble.TypeDebt_CODE  = 'SS' or 'GT' move vcmem.membermci_idno where CaseRelationShip_CODE = 'C'
else move T1052.mci_num for the dependents. For CS obligations that are charging, the dependent(s) must be active. If not active, do not move inactive DPs.
If moving dependents all financials need to be divided by the total number of dependents added to the obligation.
For arrears only cases:
Any child linked to the order  i.e. an OBLE is converted with a DP MCI, that DP  must have an active status in VCMEM.  i.e. VCMEM.CaseMemberStatus_CODE needs to be  converted to 'A'.
For arrears only cases where NO DP is linked to the latest order in DACSES:
If only 1 DP on case: Link that DP to the order   
If more than 1 DP on case: 1 (or more) DPs are active - link those DPs
    If no DPs are active and  1 or more were linked to a previous order Link those DPs from the previous order  
    If no DPs are active and none were  ever linked to order: Link the youngest DP (if twins or triplets etc..  link all)

Rule:If T1048.sub_typ_cd = OSTATA, then move T1048_uresa_cd.  Use state fips followed by 5 zeroes.
If client mailing address payment fips code > 0(T1051.PAYMENT_FIPS_CD WHERE ADD_TYP_CD = 'MAIL'), move T1051_payment_fips cd. Use state fips followed by all zeroes.
If neither condition exists, default to 1000000 (Delaware fips).

Rule:If T1048.sub_typ_cd = OSTATA, then move T1048_uresa_cd.  Use state fips followed by 5 zeroes.
If client mailing address payment fips code > 0(T1051.PAYMENT_FIPS_CD WHERE ADD_TYP_CD = 'MAIL'), move T1051_payment_fips cd. Use state fips followed by all zeroes.
If neither condition exists, default to 1000000 (Delaware fips).

Rule:A handful of No charge cases are not updated correctly in the DACSES court order record. 
Where the case (T1044) has a No charge in field CHARGE_FREQ_CD, this field will be used to override the incorrect frequency and be converted accordingly.
Where the debt type is GT (APFEES) move O (one-time)
Charge frequency table lookup

Rule:For SPLSUP, CURSUP, MEDSUP move Freq_amt, else move 0.
CR 67:
If there is more than 1 DP on an open ended obligation:
And it is a IVD case with a Delaware order(ISSUINGORDERFIPS_CODE  = 100000)  
And some (not all) of the DPs are 19 or older Move 0 to the DPs that are 19 or older
Divide the freq_amt amongst the  DPs that are younger than 19.
If  ALL DPs on the open obligation are 19 years old or older:
  And it is a IVD case with a Delaware order (ISSUINGORDERFIPS_CODE  = 100000)  
Move 0 to the periodic_amnt for all DPs
Rule:Move the corresponding arrears freq_amt into this field.  For example CUSTM1 aligns with MEDSUP and CUSTA1 aligns with CURSUP.
Rule:For obligations that have a frequency code of semi-monthly (S), use the DACSES begin month and year and default the day to 1 (1st of the month).

Rule:If  ALL DPs on the open obligation are 19 years old or older:                                                                                 And it is a IVD case with a Delaware order (ISSUINGORDERFIPS_CODE  = 100000)  
Endd date all oble's with conversion date 
If there is more than 1 DP on an open ended obligation:
And it is a IVD case with a Delaware order (ISSUINGORDERFIPS_CODE  = 100000)  
And some (not all) of the DPs are 19 or older
End date the 'old' DP(s) with conversion date
End date the remaining DPs with high date unless:
If the DACSES end date is 10/1/2013-4/1/2014 convert the DACSES end date.
All other  cases (non ivd, IVD with  ISSUINGORDERFIPS_CODE  NOT equal 100000) with open ended current support - move high date to the  end date.

Rule:A. If voble.FIPS_code <> '1000000' move the fips code. For South Carolina, use the T1048_uresa_cd or T1051.payment_fips_cd -whichever was used for VOBLE.Fips_CODE. 
B. If VCMEM.MEMBERMCI_IDNO for the client = '999998' then obtain and move the related VOTHP.OtherParty_IDNO for the division of family services.
C. If DebtType = GT (Genetic Testing)  then obtain and move the related VOTHP.OtherParty_IDNO for genetic testing.
D. Move VCMEM.MEMBERMCI_IDNO where CaseRelationShip_CODE = 'C'  when none of the above are true.

Rule:If checkrecipient_idno represents a fips code move '2'
If checkrecipient_idno represents an agency (FC Foster care) or type is Genetic Testing move '3'
else move '1'.
LOV Disbursed To, REFM GENR/FUND.
